title: YouTube Poop- Mario and Luigi Football Uncensored!
description:
WARNING: CONTAINS STRONG LANGUAGE AND LOUD NOISES!!!

Also, this video has no view count. Sorry, I can't tell you why. I can tell you that this video currently has ~180,000 views based on what I see in the video details.
